nodes.name: constants.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the STATUS_COLORS lookup mapping task status types to their display colors for the status icon.

nodes.name: StatusIcon.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders an SVG status icon that visually reflects a task's status type, optional progress, and hover state.

nodes.name: TasksTableView.test.ts
nodes.summary: Source-level test that reads the TasksTableView component file to assert structural conventions.

nodes.name: CreateTaskAssigneePicker.tsx
nodes.summary: Searchable popover picker for selecting a task assignee from the list of workspace users.

nodes.name: useHybridSearch.ts
nodes.summary: Hook combining exact and fuzzy Fuse.js search over tasks, merging and deduplicating the two result sets.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel re-exporting the LabelsCell table cell component.

nodes.name: LabelsCell.tsx
nodes.summary: Table cell rendering a task's labels as chips, truncating to the first two with an overflow count.

nodes.name: TasksView.test.ts
nodes.summary: Source-level test reading the TasksView component to assert structural expectations.

nodes.name: sorting.ts
nodes.summary: Comparator utilities that order tasks, statuses, and priorities for table sorting and dropdown display.

nodes.name: DiscardConfirmDialog.tsx
nodes.summary: Confirmation dialog prompting the user before discarding workspace changes.

nodes.name: StatusIndicator.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders a workspace status icon chosen from the current status value with configurable styling.

nodes.name: FilesTabHeaderButton.tsx
nodes.summary: Icon button for the workspace files tab header with a loading state.

nodes.name: PierreRowContextMenu.tsx
nodes.summary: Context menu anchored to a Pierre file-tree row, closing on outside interaction.

nodes.name: getPRFlowState.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests covering PR flow state derivation across sync and pull-request status permutations.

nodes.name: getPRFlowState.ts
nodes.summary: Derives the PR action header's flow state and selects the action button, PR link, and status badge for a workspace.

nodes.name: BaseBranchSelector.tsx
nodes.summary: Searchable dropdown for choosing the base branch to diff workspace changes against.

nodes.name: FolderHeader.tsx
nodes.summary: Collapsible folder header in the changes file list showing folder name and file count.

nodes.name: ShadowRowHoverActions.tsx
nodes.summary: Overlays hover and context-menu actions on shadow-DOM file-tree rows by tracking the hovered row's rect.

nodes.name: useMeasuredTreeHeight.ts
nodes.summary: Hook measuring the rendered height of the shadow-DOM file tree, retrying until the container is ready.

nodes.name: buildTreeShape.ts
nodes.summary: Builds the directory shape (unique dirs and per-directory file counts) from a flat list of file paths.

nodes.name: CommitRow.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders a single commit row in the commit filter dropdown with a relative timestamp.

nodes.name: SessionSelectorItem.tsx
nodes.summary: List item in the chat session selector supporting selection and deletion of a session.

nodes.name: ChatInputDropZone.tsx
nodes.summary: Drop zone wrapping the workspace chat input, inserting dragged file mentions into the prompt.

nodes.name: FileDropOverlay.tsx
nodes.summary: Visual overlay shown over the workspace chat input while a file is being dragged.

nodes.name: LinkedIssuePill.tsx
nodes.summary: Barrel/thin module exposing the LinkedIssuePill component for the workspace chat input footer.

nodes.name: StatusIcon
nodes.summary: Renders the appropriate SVG for a task status type, drawing progress arcs and hover affordances.

nodes.name: CreateTaskAssigneePicker
nodes.summary: Popover assignee picker filtering users by name and email and emitting the selected user.

nodes.name: useHybridSearch
nodes.summary: Builds exact and fuzzy Fuse indices over tasks and returns a search callback merging both match sets.

nodes.name: LabelsCell
nodes.summary: Renders up to two label chips for a task row plus an overflow indicator.

nodes.name: compareTasks
nodes.summary: Comparator ordering tasks first by status type then by priority for the tasks table.

nodes.name: compareStatusesForDropdown
nodes.summary: Comparator ordering status options for dropdown display.

nodes.name: comparePrioritiesForDropdown
nodes.summary: Comparator ordering priority options for dropdown display.

nodes.name: DiscardConfirmDialog
nodes.summary: Renders the discard-changes confirmation dialog and invokes the confirm handler.

nodes.name: getStatusIcon
nodes.summary: Maps a workspace status value to its corresponding icon element.

nodes.name: StatusIndicator
nodes.summary: Renders the workspace status icon with configurable container and icon styling.

nodes.name: FilesTabHeaderButton
nodes.summary: Icon button for the files tab header, showing a loading indicator when busy.

nodes.name: PierreRowContextMenu
nodes.summary: Renders a context menu anchored to a file-tree row rect, closing on dismissal.

nodes.name: getPRFlowState
nodes.summary: Computes the PR flow state from sync and pull-request inputs for the action header.

nodes.name: selectActionButton
nodes.summary: Selects the appropriate PR action button descriptor for a given flow state.

nodes.name: selectPRLink
nodes.summary: Derives the pull-request link to display from the flow state.

nodes.name: selectStatusBadge
nodes.summary: Selects the status badge descriptor (including unavailable and sync states) for the flow state.

nodes.name: BaseBranchSelector
nodes.summary: Searchable dropdown filtering branches and emitting the chosen base branch.

nodes.name: FolderHeader
nodes.summary: Renders a collapsible folder header with name and file count in the changes list.

nodes.name: ShadowRowHoverActions
nodes.summary: Tracks the hovered shadow-DOM file row and overlays inline and context-menu actions positioned to it.

nodes.name: useMeasuredTreeHeight
nodes.summary: Measures the file tree's rendered height via shadow DOM, retrying with rAF until ready and re-measuring on model changes.

nodes.name: buildTreeShape
nodes.summary: Derives sorted unique directories and per-directory file counts from a flat path list.

nodes.name: CommitRow
nodes.summary: Renders a commit row with its message and a relative timestamp.

nodes.name: SessionSelectorItem
nodes.summary: Chat session list item that selects a session on click and deletes it with a toast confirmation.

nodes.name: ChatInputDropZone
nodes.summary: Wraps the workspace chat input as a drop target, inserting dragged file-mention paths into the prompt.

nodes.name: FileDropOverlay
nodes.summary: Renders the drag overlay shown over the workspace chat input when a file drag is active.
